channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Walmart issues worse-than-expected outlook as high gas prices hit shoppers
item.description: Walmart's CFO, John David Rainey, said higher tax returns helped offset the effect of elevated gas prices in the first quarter.

item.title: Quantum stocks soar as U.S. reportedly plans $2 billion ‘award’ and taking equity stakes
item.description: Quantum computing shares popped in premarket trading following reports that the U.S. government will award grants to nine firms operating in the space.

item.title: Stellantis unveils $70 billion turnaround plan, targets positive cash flow by 2028
item.description: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa unveiled a new five-year strategic plan Thursday worth 60 billion euros (US$69.7 billion).

item.title: Oil market could enter ‘red zone’ by July as stocks dwindle ahead of summer travel season, IEA chief says
item.description: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol said the single most important solution to the Iran war energy shock is the unconditional reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: This utility stock could get a boost from data center deals, JPMorgan says
item.description: The investment bank upgraded the public utility company to overweight from neutral.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: IBM, Walmart, Rocket Lab, Nvidia & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

item.title: Nvidia says it has ‘largely conceded’ China’s AI chip market to Huawei
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said the company has "largely conceded" China's advanced artificial intelligence chip market to Huawei.

item.title: Eli Lilly says next-generation weight loss drug clears crucial obesity trial
item.description: The results bring Lilly one step closer to filing for approval of the injection, retatrutide, which works differently from existing injections and pills.

item.title: Iran reviews U.S. peace proposal as Trump says he’s willing to wait 'a few days'
item.description: It comes after President Donald Trump said he was prepared to wait a few more days to "get the right answers" from Tehran.

item.title: Billionaire families bet on semiconductor and energy stocks in first quarter during Iran war
item.description: Private investment firms of David Tepper and other billionaires doubled down on chipmakers despite the Iran war pressuring data center economics.

item.title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in CNBC interview
item.description: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.

item.title: SpaceX's historic IPO plans: Billions in losses and Musk's massive ownership
item.description: SpaceX filed for an IPO and plans to list on Nasdaq under ticker SPCX, according to its SEC prospectus.

item.title: Cavs owner Dan Gilbert turns grief over son’s rare disease into search for a cure
item.description: Dan Gilbert honors his son Nick by funding research into neurofibromatosis, the rare disease that took Nick’s life.

item.title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
item.description: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.

item.title: Zuckerberg's Meta layoffs memo: 'Success isn't a given' in the AI era
item.description: Meta on Wednesday commenced its latest round of layoffs, which affect about 10% of the company's workforce or roughly 8,000 jobs.

item.title: Three key takeaways from Putin's Beijing trip — and what they reveal about China-Russia ties
item.description: Putin left Beijing with declarations of enduring friendship with China and a stack of bilateral agreements — but without the energy breakthrough Moscow desperately sought.

item.title: Sinkhole shuts runway at LaGuardia Airport, delaying flights, Port Authority warns
item.description: The Port Authority said travelers should expect delays and cancellations, with thunderstorms expected also expected to roll in Wednesday.

item.title: Crash signals are getting louder for European stocks, says BofA — Here's why
item.description: European stocks are facing a sharp reversal, according to a key BofA price momentum gauge.

item.title: Anthropic set to hit $10.9 billion in revenue during second quarter, source says
item.description: If Anthropic hits the revenue target, it will post its first profitable quarter, a source told CNBC

item.title: We're raising our price target on Nvidia after another knockout quarter and guide
item.description: Nvidia shares aren't moving much in extended trading. But the initial reaction hardly tells the full story.

item.title: Intuit plans to cut workforce by about 17% as tax software maker reckons with slowing growth
item.description: Intuit's stock has been hammered this year as investors worry that generative artificial intelligence models could threaten software companies.

item.title: HOA fees are soaring — use these tools to keep your unit affordable
item.description: If your HOA dues are on the rise, consider these options to keep your housing costs in your budget.

item.title: Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered 'muscle trucks' despite high gas prices
item.description: Stellantis plans to launch a new lineup of what it's calling "muscle trucks" for its Ram brand despite elevated U.S. gas prices due to the war in Iran.

item.title: Ubisoft shares plunge after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of further losses to come
item.description: Ubisoft shares plunged on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the world of tech investing has changed and it's not going back
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks have replaced software as the market's technology leaders.

item.title: 'Europe doesn't realize how dangerous it is': Telecoms CEO warns of U.S. dominance in satellites, AI
item.description: Europe is vulnerable with a non-state actor like Starlink having the power to switch off the continent's connectivity.

item.title: OpenAI to confidentially file for IPO as soon as Friday: Source
item.description: OpenAI is working with banks including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.

item.title: SoftBank Group shares soar 20% as Nvidia earnings signal strong AI momentum
item.description: SoftBank Group is closely tied to the AI boom through its stake in Arm Holdings, whose chip designs are used in AI servers and data centers powered by Nvidia systems.

item.title: UK-Gulf trade deal a 'monumental achievement,' Bahrain industry minister tells CNBC
item.description: Abdulla bin Adel Fakhro said the deal was a win-win for the U.K. and Gulf states.

item.title: Congress is best chance to stop Trump 'lawfare' fund, attorneys say
item.description: The Department of Justice has set up a $1.8 billion fund that will purportedly compensate victims of prosecutorial overreach under the Biden administration.
